title: Turkish-Style Cheese Bake
description: A rich and savory Turkish-inspired cheese bake, perfect for a comforting meal. This dish is a delicious twist on traditional cheese and pastry combinations.
instructions: Cut the dense bread into 1-inch (2.5cm) cubes and place in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, mix the Turkish cheese, garlic, parsley, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cheese mixture to the bread cubes and mix until well combined.
Add the melted butter to the bread mixture and mix until the bread is evenly coated.
Transfer the mixture to a 9-inch (23cm) round baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
